query: Run /handover. There is no task.md. The .resonance/01_state.md is the blank template with no filled-in content. There are no commits in the last 24 hours.
expected_behavior: Does not crash or return an error
Writes a valid handover file with all 7 sections present even with minimal input
Adds a note at the top: 'Synthesized from files. No live session context available.' or equivalent
What Was Done section writes 'No commits this session' — does not fabricate commits
Open TODOs section does not fabricate specific file names or function names not mentioned
Gotchas section writes 'None identified this session' rather than inventing warnings
Does not skip sections — every section is present even if its content is minimal
Does not error on missing task.md — handles it with a skip and a note
